text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
And that's how I made the first quip between us. 
Really clashes with my graceful, lovely image, don't it?
choice_data_list: WELL I THINK YOU'RE ALWAYS LOVELY!
WELL I THINK YOU'RE ALWAYS LOVELY!

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
Keep ya dang voice down, it's embarrassin'! …But now that I 
think about it, that moment was the first thing leading to us 
teaming up.

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
Hey, don't make my FULL FRIGGIN' NAME our team name! 
And wait, which half of my name are ya tryin' to steal!? 
'Cuz I ain't givin' ya either!

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
That's enough of that. Back to the story. 
Here's how the two of us finally became a team——

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
(——Aw, crap! I accidentally clapped back! 
But what the heck was I supposed to do? 
Everyone at the academy's just so——)

text_block_list.name: Gran Alegria
text_block_list.text:
There we go! Perfect ♪ A miler's gotta live and breathe miles! 
And today my pigtails are… Sixteen miles high! Awesome ♪

text_block_list.name: Calstone Light O
text_block_list.text:
Why!? WHY!? Why are all these tables so round…!? Okay 
that's it I'm going to cut them up and so they're all nice and 
straight. Don't try to stop me ma'am I'm going to do this!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Bwooh～ Fwooh～ Shoobiedoobiedoobiedooo ♪ …Okey dokey, 
that's enough training! Time to burst right through the Earth's 
mantleeeee!

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text: (Everyone at the academy is just so… so… So "interesting"—— There's too much low-hanging fruit to snap at!!)

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
(WHAT DA HECK IS SIXTEEN MILES ABOUT THAT!? WHY'S IT 
ALWAYS STRAIGHT LINES WITH YA!? YOU'RE NOT BREAKIN' 
NO STINKIN' MANTLE WIGGLIN' 'ROUND LIKE DAAAAAAT!!)

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
(…Ugh… Hough… I can't deal with this crazy school… 
I can feel the one-liners bursting outta my chest…)

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
(But—— I kept 'em in. Kept myself from cracking, every single 
day! Talk about perseverance! Beautiful friggin' perseverance! 
Just gotta keep holdin' it in, and I can be a star!)

text_block_list.name: Young Lala
text_block_list.text:
"Ahaha, dis comedian's so silly! It's all goofs wit dis guy! 
…Ahahaha! No duh he got yelled at! Ya can't be doin' dat!"

text_block_list.name: Young Lala
text_block_list.text:
"Hey, ma, pa! I wanna big ol' paper fan, too! 
C'mon, please? I got a perfect on my tests, remember? 
Can't I get a lil' reward～?"

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
(I was such a tomboyish little rascal back then, and I loved 
watching those comedy shows on TV. That is… 'Till I found out 
about Orfe-san.)

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
(My admiration for her shook me to my core. 
…I wanted to be like her. No, I KNEW I could be like her! 
So I made up my mind!)

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
"Hello, mother. Hello father. A very good mornin' to ya both. 
It's a lovely day today… Oho, why the shocked faces? 
Now then… My warmest regards to ya today."

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
That's right. I transformed myself. 
I mean, c'mon—— 
The belle of the ball's gotta be prim and proper, don't she?

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
(Every day, I controlled my usual emotional self… And 
I finally got to where I am today. I should be just 
a step away from my dream… Just one more step…!)

I'd started observing Lucky Lilac's training, hoping to figure 
out what she needed to gain Orfevre's approval.
choice_data_list: I want to see what you're capable of first.
I want to see what you're capable of first.

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
Understood. So muscle training's first on the schedule? 
This regimen seems a mite bit tough… 
…But I'll do my best.

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
——Phew… I've finished without any issues. I do have to 
mention… I wouldn't mind if ya made the workout a bit more 
intense.
choice_data_list: <size=30>(That workout was meant for post-debut racers, though…)</size>

text_block_list.text:
Lucky Lilac's skills were no joke. She had strong fundamentals, 
and even outside of running she was excellent. I couldn't point 
out a single flaw. But that meant…

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text: ……She didn't give me her approval today either.

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
…I even had ya helpin' me, but I still haven't made any progress. 
…I really must apologize.
choice_data_list: No, I'm sorry for not being any help…

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
Please don't apologize… It's my fault for not bein' 
good enough. In fact, my numbers have actually 
gotten better since ya started helpin' me…

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text: ……Really, what am I missing?
choice_data_list: (…I want to cheer her up, but…)

text_block_list.text:
I didn't know the right thing to say to get her 
out of her situation. But at the very least, I wanted 
to put a smile back on her worried face——

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text: Hm?

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
………………………… 
Woooow～ It really does look like a turkey. 
I'd say it looks like a dog, myself, but ain't that cute?
choice_data_list: (I hope that helped her relax a bit.)

text_block_list.text:
I knew it didn't count for much, but at least 
I managed to get her to smile again.

The days went on with the two of us communicating like that, 
trying to figure things out through trial and error. And on one of 
those days——

We decided we'd train out in the fields to give her a change of 
scenery. It was pretty clear that she'd been tiring herself out 
lately…

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
choice_data_list: …I'll play you a fanfare to cheer you up!
…I'll play you a fanfare to cheer you up!

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text: What?

After that, Lucky Lilac's running changed completely. 
It was different from anything I'd seen her do before.

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
Hut… 
…HAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAH!!
——For the first time, she seemed as if she was glowing.

That night, I invited her for a walk outside, hoping to figure out 
what caused the changed in her running. Then——

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text: Oh… Looks like they're practicing their manzai comedy routine.

text_block_list.name: Young Comedian A
text_block_list.text: Hey all, we're the "Happy Hi-Hacks". Wow, big crowd in the house tonight… We got ladies, gents, deer, Palaeoloxodon naumanni, woolly mammoths——

text_block_list.name: Young Comedian B
text_block_list.text:
Why are we getting all prehistoric!? What, are you saying we 
time travelled!? …Wait, get a load of that guy's 
caveman-lookin' fit! Aw crap, we really DID time travel!!!!!

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
……Heehee. The fool plays things loose, and the foil 
straightens him out with a blunt comeback. The two of them 
are well balanced, and their timing's great too.

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text: Say, Trainer. Which half of a manzai duo do ya think sets the rhythm for their routine? The fool or the foil?

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
That's certainly a valid theory. But personally… I think it's the 
fool that takes the lead by bringing out the foil's energy,

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
The fool's best goofs get followed up by a satisfying quip 
from the foil. …That rhythm is the source of their 
explosive comedic power.

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
……Oh, no, not especially. 
That little tidbit was just something I saw on the TV.

The fool brings out the best in the foil… The same 
could apply to a trainer and their trainee. Suddenly, 
I remembered the training we did earlier that day.
choice_data_list: (When I acted goofy like a fool——)

text_block_list.text:
Lucky Lilac made a very peculiar hand motion. 
And right after that, she unleashed that incredible acceleration.

…Her hand took that iconic shape. The way she accelerated… 
Putting it all together——

Her prim and proper racing was excellent. It suited the "flower 
of the flock" she talked about becoming. But there was 
something else hiding beneath it. If I could only draw it out…

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
"The fool's best goofs get followed up by a satisfying quip 
from the foil. …That rhythm is the source of their 
explosive comedic power." ——
